header_info.title: Global Solar Power Tracker - February 2026

entries.name: operating
entries.definition: Commercial operation date achieved.

entries.name: construction
entries.definition: Equipment installation has begun (not just clearing/roads).

entries.name: pre-construction
entries.definition: Projects that are actively moving forward in seeking governmental approvals, land rights, or financing.

entries.name: announced
entries.definition: Projects that been publicly reported but have not yet moved actively forward by applying for permits or seeking land, material, or financing. Examples: (1) projects are the potential “Phase 2” at a location where “Phase 1” is currently under development, (2) Projects that are described in long-range company or governmental planning documents.

entries.name: shelved
entries.definition: Suspension announced. The status is marked as "shelved - inferred 2y" if no updates have been published in 2 or more years.

entries.name: mothballed
entries.definition: Disused but not dismantled.

entries.name: retired
entries.definition: Dismantled.

entries.name: cancelled
entries.definition: Cancellation announced. The status is marked as "cancelled - inferred 4y" if no updates have been publishe din 4 or more years.

entries.name: Date Last Researched
entries.definition: Date that this project was last researched by the researcher
entries.notes: Units: yyyy/mm/dd.

entries.name: Country/Area
entries.definition: Country or area the project is located in (Unabbreviated)
entries.notes: The Country/Area column presents energy data within various economic contexts, and the geographical unit does not strictly follow political boundaries.

entries.name: Project Name
entries.definition: Commonly used name
entries.notes: Preference is for a government provided name. Without that information, the name the owner or operating company uses was taken, or the name was generated based on project location.

entries.name: Phase Name
entries.definition: Common name of the project phase
entries.notes: Roman numerals are changed to numbers. If the Owner uses non-sequential numbers or other characters, those are used.

entries.name: Project Name in Local Language / Script
entries.definition: Commonly used name in the locally used script
entries.notes: Left blank for local languages that use the roman/latin alphabet. Otherwise local name in local script provided if possible.

entries.name: Other Name(s)
entries.definition: Alternative names, including the name in local script

entries.name: Capacity (MW)
entries.definition: Nameplate capacity, or best available data, of the phase in megawatts rounded to its nearest tenth.
entries.notes: Units: Megawatt (MW). Please refer to "Thresholds for Data Categories" section above.

entries.name: Capacity Rating
entries.definition: The reported capacity rating, unknown selected if not provided
entries.notes: Units: MWac, MWp/dc, unknown. Capacity may be reported as the DC / peak value the arrays could provide or as the AC value of what will be tied into the grid. This is often not specified and could be either value when reported as just 'MW'.

entries.name: Technology Type
entries.definition: If the solar installation uses PV (Photovoltaic) technology to create a current or uses heat from the sun to run a turbine
entries.notes: Units: PV, Solar Thermal, Assumed PV. Projects for which no information could be found specifying the technology type are listed as "Assumed PV" because PV is by far the most common technology.

entries.name: Status
entries.definition: see rows 20-27 above
entries.notes: Units: see above.

entries.name: Start year
entries.definition: Year the project is or is expected to be commissioned
entries.notes: Units: yyyy. Latest date was taken when original data source provided a range; Start years not included for projects that are cancelled or shelved.

entries.name: Year
entries.definition: Capacity value is accurate as of the end of this year
entries.notes: Units: yyyy. Specific to distributed solar tab.

entries.name: Retired year
entries.definition: Year the plant is or is expected to be taken offline
entries.notes: Units: yyyy.

entries.name: Operator
entries.definition: The company that operates the project
entries.notes: Company that performs day-to-day operations and maintenance of the project.

entries.name: Operator Name in Local Language / Script
entries.definition: Company name that operates the project in the locally used script
entries.notes: Left blank for local languages use the roman/latin alphabet. Otherwise operator name in local script included if possible.

entries.name: Owner
entries.definition: The company that directly owns the plant

entries.name: Owner Name in Local Language / Script
entries.definition: Company name that directly owns the project in the locally used script
entries.notes: Left blank for local languages that use the roman/latin alphabet. Otherwise direct owner name included in local script if possible.

entries.name: Hydrogen
entries.definition: True if a project phase is dedicated for green hydrogen production
entries.notes: Units: True, blank.

entries.name: Associated Storage
entries.definition: True if a project phase has existing or planned co-located storage
entries.notes: Units: True, blank.

entries.name: Latitude
entries.definition: Latitude, assumed WGS84 (google maps), of the project phase
entries.notes: Units: decimal degrees.

entries.name: Longitude
entries.definition: Longitude, assumed WGS84 (google maps), of the project phase
entries.notes: Units: decimal degrees.

entries.name: Location accuracy
entries.definition: Location is Approximate based on using nearest city or other information in data sources, or Location is Exact when explicitly provided in data source
entries.notes: Units: approximate, exact. Locations feature 4 decimal places for Latitude and Longitude fields.

entries.name: City
entries.definition: City, town, village, or township (China) where project is located

entries.name: Local area (taluk, county)
entries.definition: County, taluk, or district (China) where project is located

entries.name: Major area (prefecture, district)
entries.definition: Prefecture, district, or municipality (China) where project is located

entries.name: State/Province
entries.definition: Subnational unit where project is located

entries.name: Subregion
entries.definition: Subregion location based on United Nations definition

entries.name: Region
entries.definition: Region location based on United Nations definition

entries.name: Other IDs (location)
entries.definition: Location identifier from external datasets
entries.notes: If there are multiple external datasets, entries are comma separated.

entries.name: Other IDs (unit/phase)
entries.definition: Unit or Phase identifier from external datasets
entries.notes: If there are multiple external datasets, entries are comma separated.

entries.name: GEM location ID
entries.definition: GEM generated ID unique for each project
entries.notes: Units: L1+11 digits. Previous GEM ID numbers have been preserved from releases prior to 2024. For example, a previous GEM ID of L812345 is now L100000812345.

entries.name: GEM phase ID
entries.definition: GEM generated ID unique for each phase
entries.notes: Units: G1+11 digits. Previous GEM ID numbers have been preserved from releases prior to 2024. For example, a previous GEM ID of G812345 is now G100000812345.

entries.name: Wiki URL
entries.definition: URL of existing, footnoted factsheet GEM.wiki page
